title: (PDF) Philosophical Perspectives on Home - Academia.edu
content: Heidegger'sphilosophyposits that human existence is fundamentally tied to the act of dwelling. Theconceptofhomeevolves through cultural contexts, from ancient Greece to modernity, reflecting societal values. Locke's views on property andhomeinfluenced Western political thought and justified colonial practices. Marx critiques capitalism's alienation, arguing it hinders the ability to ...
